name: Iso11783OPChangePriority
title: Iso11783OPChangePriority
syntax: long Iso11783OPChangePriority( dword ecuHandle, dword maskID, dword priority );
description: The function changes the priority of an alarm mask. A Change Priority command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)
